en.extract:
The Babar whistler (Pachycephala sharpei) is a passerine bird in the family Pachycephalidae that is endemic to the island of Babar which lies at the eastern end of the Lesser Sunda Islands. It was formerly treated as a subspecies of the yellow-throated whistler.


Taxonomy
The Babar whistler was formally described in 1884 by the German naturalist Adolf Bernhard Meyer based on a specimen collected on the island of Babar in Indonesia. He coined the binomial name Pachycephala sharpei where the specific epithet was chosen to honour the English ornithologist Richard Bowdler Sharpe. The Babar whistler was formerly classified as a subspecies of the yellow-throated whistler (Pachycephala macrorhyncha) but is now considered to be a separate species based on the deep genetic divergence, morphology, and distinct female plumage. The species is monotypic: no subspecies are recognised.

The '''Babar whistler''' ('''''Pachycephala sharpei''''') is a [[passerine]] bird in the family [[Pachycephalidae]] that is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the island of [[Babar Islands|Babar]] which lies at the eastern end of the [[Lesser Sunda Islands]]. It was formerly treated as a [[subspecies]] of the [[yellow-throated whistler]].

==Taxonomy==
The Babar whistler was [[species description|formally described]] in 1884 by the German naturalist [[Adolf Bernhard Meyer]] based on a specimen collected on the island of [[Babar Islands|Babar]] in Indonesia. He coined the [[binomial name]] ''Pachycephala sharpei'' where the specific epithet was chosen to honour the English ornithologist [[Richard Bowdler Sharpe]].<ref>{{ cite journal | last=Meyer | first=Adolf Bernhard | author-link=Adolf Bernhard Meyer | date=1884 | title=Ueber neue und ungenügend bekannte Vögel, Nester und Eier aus dem Ostindischen Archipel im Königl. Zoologischen Museum zu Dresden | language=German, Latin | journal=Sitzungsberichte und Abhandlungen der Naturwissenschaftlichen Gesellschaft Isis in Dresden | volume= 1883-1884| pages=3–64 [36] | url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/53706266 }}</ref><ref>{{ cite book | editor-last=Paynter | editor-first=Raymond A.
